description:
Replace LSP-based format-on-save with conform.nvim for per-filetype formatter control, fallback chains, and better error handling. LazyVim default formatter dispatcher.

Would consolidate formatting config currently split between `lsp/languages.nix` format types and `lua/user/format.lua`.

Affected files:
- `home-modules/editors/neovim/lsp/formatting.nix`
- `home-modules/editors/neovim/lua/user/format.lua`
title: Add conform.nvim for formatting
